case_title: SECURITY NATIONAL LIFE INSURANCE CO. A UTAH VS. KIRSTI NEELY

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, KIRSTI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SECURITY NATIONAL LIFE INSURANCE CO. A UTAH CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEELY, KIRSTI $152,057.30 PRINCIPAL, $21,425.25 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $173,892.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
DECLARATION OF STEPHEN J. KOTTMEIER IN SUPPORT OF INTEREST AFTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY NATIONAL LIFE INSURANCE CO. A UTAH CORPORATION
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, KIRSTI

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY NATIONAL LIFE INSURANCE CO. A UTAH CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, KIRSTI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SECURITY NATIONAL LIFE INSURANCE CO. A UTAH CORPORATION SERVED JAN-23-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEELY, KIRSTI PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON FEB-23-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF SECURITY NATIONAL LIFE INSURANCE CO. A UTAH CORPORATION
